author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice
book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice

title: Canon XIII.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That a bishop should not be ordained except by many bishops, but if there should be necessity he may be ordained by three.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Bishop Aurelius said: What says your holiness on this matter?

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: By all the bishops it was answered: The decrees of the ancients must be observed by us, to wit, that without the consent of the Primate of any province even many bishops assembled together should not lightly presume to ordain a bishop.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: But should there be a necessity, at his bidding, three bishops should ordain him in any place they happen to be, and if anyone contrary to his profession and subscription shall come into any place he shall thereby deprive himself of his honour.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: At the bidding of the Primate even three bishops can make a bishop.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: But whoever goes counter to his profession, and subscription, is deprived of his honour by his own judgment.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This is Canon xij. of the before mentioned Synod of 387 or 390.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: He that was called a Metropolitan in other Churches was a Primate in Africa.
